message:
feat(abi): implement native _IO_flush_all_linebuffered and _IO_getline

Replace glibc-delegating stubs with pure native implementations:

- _IO_flush_all_linebuffered: call fflush(NULL) as safe superset of
  line-buffered-only flush behavior
- _IO_getline: delegate to _IO_getline_info for DRY implementation
- _IO_getline_info: native byte-by-byte read loop with delimiter
  handling (include/exclude/consume modes) and EOF tracking

All three functions now operate without glibc fallback, consistent with
the ongoing IO ABI nativization effort.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
